Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetStencilTestEnabled method specifies whether stencil testing will be active, and configures some settings related to stencil testing.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void SetStencilTestEnabled(bool state, uint32_t compareMask = std::numeric_limits<uint32_t>::max(), uint32_t writeMask = std::numeric_limits<uint32_t>::max());

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: True to enable stencil testing, false to disable stencil testing.
The bit mask applied to both the stencil reference value and stored stencil value before comparison.
The bit mask that controls which stencil bits may be updated by stencil operations.
